title: SOL 2pk x 50ml Fabric Glue Strong with Spreader & Tape Measure - Scout Badge Adhesive for Crafts, Upholstery, Material, Textile, Felt or Wool - Waterproof, Flexible, Fast Drying, Durable Bond
features: EXTRA BENEFIT – Receive 2x Large 50ml Tubes of Fabric Glue textile adhesive, now with Glue Spreader and 150cm Measuring Tape included. Easy to use, fast drying and the best tool for any kind of sewing project as a handy alternative to needle and thread.

QUALITY – Comparable to well known brands that cost double the amount for half the size! Strong flexible clothes glue that can withstand machine washing and ironing. Our waterproof Textile Glue will help make permanent repairs, additions and alterations to fixing clothing, curtains, embroidery, ribbon, button, sequins, covers, cloths, jeans etc. Will do invisible mends and remains flexible when dry.

VERSATILE CLOTH GLUE - Our fabric adhesive is perfect as a permanent bond for most fabrics, such as hemming, turn-ups, curtains, clothing, Denim, Shoes, labels, patchwork, sequin, badges, gems, rhinestones, patches, soft toys, soft furnishings, most fabric repairs including mending a hole and alterations etc. Can also be used with fabrics for Arts and Crafts.

SAVE TIME AND EASE OF USE - Our clothing glue is so easy to use as no Needle and Threads are required. Fast drying fabric glue strong and no special instructions are required, just let it dry in an instant. Small applications dry in minutes as our strong fabric glues bonds with speed. You never know when you will need a quick fabric repair fix. In just minutes, you can save yourself hours, with this fabric super glue.

LONG LASTING - Each tube of 50ml fabric glue for badges sewing glue is 13.5cm x 4cm x 2.5cm and is packed in a metal tube with an easy-to-use cap. Each tube can last for years with its amazing life, so you can buy as many as you want with confidence!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Need a Fabric Glue? Add these items for your DIY Arts and Crafts Project! 2pk Fabric Glue Add To Basket 50ml Fabric Glue Add To Basket 4pk Fabric Glue Buying Options 30m Hemming Tape Buying Options 1250pcs Mini Pom Poms Add To Basket 10pk Kids Glitter Tubes Add To Basket 10pk Large Googly Eyes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 3,121 4.3 out of 5 stars 5,383 4.0 out of 5 stars 12 4.6 out of 5 stars 8 4.6 out of 5 stars 121 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,760 4.4 out of 5 stars 93 Price £5.79 £ 5 . 79 £4.79 £ 4 . 79 — — £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Perfect for DIY ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Long Lasting ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Versatile for All Needs ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Efficient and Effective ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Can this fabric glue withstand washing and ironing? Yes, this fabric glue is strong and flexible, able to withstand machine washing and ironing once fully dried, ensuring long-lasting repairs and additions to your clothing or fabric projects. What types of fabrics can I use this glue on? This fabric glue works on most fabrics, including denim, cotton, polyester, felt, and more. It’s perfect for clothing repairs, crafts, and upholstery projects, providing a permanent bond for a wide range of materials. How quickly does the glue dry? The fabric glue dries fast. Small applications can dry in minutes, making it perfect for quick fixes without the need for needles or threads. This fast-drying adhesive allows you to get on with your project or repair quickly. Is this fabric glue suitable for craft projects? Absolutely! This fabric glue is versatile and ideal for arts and crafts projects, including attaching sequins, badges, rhinestones, and patches. It works well with both soft and more durable fabrics used in craft-making. Does the glue remain flexible after drying? Yes, once dried, the glue remains flexible, ensuring that the fabric maintains its natural movement. It won’t stiffen the material, making it great for clothing repairs and projects that require flexibility.
